play.subtitle: Listen to our worship songs and experience hope through music
play.subscribe_text: Subscribe to our YouTube channel for new releases!

hero.title: Made to Worship
hero.subtitle: Bringing hope through Christian music in Greece

home.who_we_are_text: Elpis Worship is a Christian worship band born in Athens, dedicated to serving Greece through music that brings hope, encouragement, and inspiration.

about.title: About Us
about.who_we_are_text: We were born and raised in Athens. We are members of the Romanian church in Kallithea. We started music as children - first in children's choirs, then at conservatories. About ten years ago, an orchestra was formed in our church. During the lockdown, the need for a worship band was born, and we realized that God has called us to serve Greece through Christian music.
about.our_name_text: We wanted a Greek name, melodic and meaningful. One day, our eyes fell on a stained glass window in our church with the word "elpis" (hope). Through our music, we want to bring hope to people!
about.mission_1: Evangelism - to spread the message of salvation
about.mission_2: Encouragement - to bring hope to believers and churches
about.mission_3: Inspiration - to inspire young people to create bands for His glory!

donate.title: Support Our Ministry
donate.subtitle: Help us continue bringing hope through worship
donate.message: Our church trusted and invested in our vision. None of us does this full-time - we all work or study. Your support helps us continue bringing hope!
